---
name: monitor-bot
description: "Use when you need terminal monitoring of bot status, process health, indicators, PnL, and errors. Trigger words: monitor_bot, terminal monitor, bot status."
---

# monitor-bot

## Purpose
Run terminal-based real-time monitoring for bot status.

## Command
```bash
cd /home/satoshi/work/satosystem
./commands/monitor_bot
```

## Remote (Raspberry Pi)
```bash
cd /home/satoshi/work/satosystem
./commands/monitor_bot --host raspberry_pi
```

## Notes
- Refresh interval: about 30s
- Stop with Ctrl+C
